subject: Spiky-haired humanoid fighter in fighting stance with energy aura
description: A male-presenting humanoid figure with tall, wild spiky dark hair stands in a forward-facing fighting stance, arms raised and ready. He wears a blue/teal fitted outfit. A crackling golden-white energy aura surrounds him, giving the composition a charged, electric feel. The background is a light burst of blue-white energy gradients. The pose reads as mid-action: not yet throwing a strike, but coiled and fully committed.
foreground: Fighter in blue outfit, spiky dark hair, energy aura glowing around body
background: Radiant energy burst, light blue and white gradient
